complaints.message: Was at least one of the collision mesh candidates acceptable?

APPEARANCE: Confirm object visual appearance.
Requirements:
- make sure the object has a valid texture or appearance (e.g., texture not black,
       transparency rendered correctly, etc).
- make sure any glass parts are transparent (would this object contain glass? e.g.
       wall pictures, clocks, etc. - anything wrong)
- compare the object against the 3ds Max image that should open up now.
complaints.complaint: there are areas in this floor that seem to be falling outside the scene, we should crop those if thats the case. also, the object has no thickness. also it has little stubs where some walls go, we should remove those.
